output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?party ?partyLabel ?leader ?leaderLabel WHERE {
  ?party wdt:P31 wd:Q202757 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q214 ; wdt:P354 ?leader .
  ?party rdfs:label ?partyLabel .
  ?leader rdfs:label ?leaderLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?partyLabel) = "en" && LANG(?leaderLabel) = "en")
}
output.answer: No political parties in Romania with leaders were found in Wikidata using the standard properties. This may indicate the data is not present or structured differently in the knowledge graph.
